---
name: New language
about: Contribute a translation for the card creator UI
title: 'New language: '
labels: translation
assignees: ''

---

**Language name (in its own language)**
e.g. Français, Español, Polski

**ISO 639-1 code**
e.g. `fr`, `es`, `pl` — see https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/List_of_ISO_639_language_codes

**Text direction**
- [ ] Left-to-right (ltr)
- [ ] Right-to-left (rtl)

**Have you already started a translation file?**
- [ ] Yes — I'll attach or link it below
- [ ] No — I'm checking if anyone else is working on this first

**Notes (optional)**
Any context about official localised faction/warband names, regional variants, or things that are tricky to translate.

---

> See [`src/lib/i18n/README.md`](https://github.com/HENNIROCKS/warcry-card-creator-2026/blob/main/src/lib/i18n/README.md) for the full contributor guide.
> Copy `src/lib/i18n/locales/en.json`, translate the values, and open a PR — no other code changes needed.
